task_card.evidence: The inspected branch handles P-format VLAs, while QD reaches the generic np.where comparison.
task_card.next: Reproduce QD behavior, extend the VLA branch to Q, and run FITS diff tests.
task_card.why: Q-format variable-length arrays fall through to np.where instead of the VLA comparison branch.

task_card.evidence: The storage implementation defers to FILE_UPLOAD_PERMISSIONS and the tests exercise several explicit modes.
task_card.next: Set the default permission mode and validate overridden and default storage behavior.
task_card.why: A None default leaves final file permissions dependent on the upload path; the intended default is explicit.

task_card.evidence: The inspected mapping stores weak-reference keys and values, while neighboring iterator and sibling helpers are not the diagnosis.
task_card.next: Add explicit Grouper state serialization and reproduce figure pickling.
task_card.why: Grouper serialization crosses weak-reference state that needs explicit pickle handling.

task_card.evidence: The inspected selection and squeeze path retains the coordinate in the one-level stacking case.
task_card.next: Drop the stale dimension coordinate after selection and add a one-level MultiIndex regression test.
task_card.why: Selecting a one-level MultiIndex leaves a scalar coordinate that squeeze does not remove before Dataset merge.

task_card.evidence: The inspected serializer applies only(pk), while manager-level select_related state remains on the queryset.
task_card.next: Clear inherited select_related state before iterating the m2m queryset and run serializer tests.
task_card.why: Serializer QuerySet.only(pk) defers a relation already selected by a custom manager, creating a compile-time conflict.

task_card.evidence: The inspected locator call passes renderer state through code paths where figure attachment is absent.
task_card.next: Propagate the figure and supply a renderer fallback, then run inset locator tests.
task_card.where: matplotlib offsetbox and inset locator call path
task_card.why: The anchored locator can be called without a usable renderer or attached figure.

task_card.evidence: The inspected transformer delegates to generic CSV splitting even when commas occur inside regex braces.
task_card.next: Add a regex-aware split helper and validate comma-containing and invalid patterns.
task_card.why: Naive comma splitting breaks regex quantifiers; the parser must respect balanced delimiters.

task_card.evidence: The multiple-inheritance reproduction sees one base marker while the sibling marker remains absent.
task_card.next: Collect markers across the relevant MRO entries and rerun mark inheritance tests.
task_card.why: A single getattr lookup follows MRO to the first pytestmark and misses a sibling base class marker.

task_card.evidence: The inspected CV wrapper materializes an iterable, while the selector repeatedly passes the original iterator.
task_card.next: Materialize the CV iterable once before candidate scoring and add an iterator regression test.
task_card.why: The same CV iterator is reused across candidate scores and is consumed after the first pass.

task_card.evidence: The reproduction modifies separately read documents, but included content still bypasses that modification.
task_card.next: Emit source-read while the Include directive reads the included file and add an include regression test.
task_card.why: The Include directive reads included content outside the source-read event path used for normal documents.

task_card.evidence: idna.encode('.example.com') raises Empty Label while the current ASCII branch bypasses IDNA validation.
task_card.next: Validate ASCII and non-ASCII hosts through the same IDNA path and run URL preparation tests.
task_card.why: ASCII host validation skips IDNA, so an invalid empty label is not caught until a later failure.

task_card.evidence: The anchor GET path checks the fragment without first validating the HTTP response status.
task_card.next: Raise for status before anchor lookup and add a 404-with-anchor regression test.
task_card.why: Anchor checking omits raise_for_status, masking a 404 as an anchor-not-found error.
